/loop

# T3 — Round 016: Marketplace + template gallery polish

Polish R006 portal-template marketplace: search, category filter,
preview thumbnails, install/use-as-starter actions.

## Mandatory pre-read

1. T3 R006 chapter `04-portal-template-marketplace.md`.
2. T3 R004 brand-page templates chapter.

## Scope

**A** — Marketplace page: search bar (fuzzy match on template name +
description), category filter chips (Incubator / Brand / Storefront /
Member-area / Affiliate / Misc), tag filter, sort (newest / most-
installed).

**B** — Each template card: preview thumbnail (auto-generated server-
side via OG-image renderer if no manual cover), name, description,
install count, "Use as starter" + "Preview" CTAs.

**C** — Preview drawer: live render of the template tree against
current brand-kit (no install required). "Use this template" CTA.

**D** — Featured row at top: 3-4 hand-picked templates per phase
(reads from a small admin-editable JSON).

**E** — Smoke + chapter `04-marketplace-polish.md` + MASTER row.

## NOT in scope

- Paid templates / template marketplace tiers (out of scope per requirements).
- Per-template ratings.

## When done
DONE referencing `016-marketplace-template-polish.md`.
